publication.seoTitle: Find Bluesky Brand Mentions and Handle Posts
publication.seoDescription: Preview Bluesky handle posts and mentions as JSON. Set onlyNew=true on a saved Task for monitoring. Independent; not affiliated with Bluesky.

discoveryValidation.reason: An active public service handle exercises both authored-post and mention matching with a ten-record cap.

monitoringChange.note: Replace the example handle with the brand handle, keep the same Task, set onlyNew to true, and schedule that Task.
